items.caption: A large, rusted port crane situated in an abandoned fishing port. the crane, with its brown and black color scheme, stands out against the clear blue sky. the crane's structure is complex, featuring multiple levels and a long, curved arm that extends towards the top right corner of the image. the ground beneath the crane is a mix of dirt and sparse patches of grass, indicating a dry and arid environment. in the background, there are several buildings and structures, some of which appear to be in disrepair. the overall scene suggests a once thriving fishing port that has now fallen into disuse.
